contato.contato-text: Liked what you saw? Reach out through one of these channels!

skills.title: Skills
skills.text: Learn a bit more about my skills and technologies

about.description:
I am currently transitioning my career into the technology field after working for four years as a professional photographer. This experience helped me develop a strong attention to detail, aesthetic sense, and creativity — skills that I now apply when building digital interfaces and experiences.

I have been building my path in technology through personal projects, academic projects, and courses focused on software development. My main interests are front-end development, user experience (UX/UI), and software quality (QA), with the goal of creating modern, functional, and intuitive interfaces.

I have a strong affinity for visual and creative projects, which is also reflected in my hobbies such as photography and music. I value my family deeply, enjoy a good cup of coffee, and the company of my cats. My goal is to continue improving technically and build a solid career in the technology field.

experienciaProfissional.descricao: I am currently seeking my first professional opportunity in the technology field. After working as a professional photographer, I began my career transition into software development.

experienciaAcademica.titulo: Lecture: Programming Immersion at Leopoldo de Miranda State School
experienciaAcademica.descricao: I was responsible for planning and delivering an immersive lecture about the fundamentals of programming for high school students, using practical and inspiring examples. The goal was to spark interest in the technology field.

Program focused on web development with an emphasis on Full Stack JavaScript. During the course, I study modern technologies used in the market and develop practical projects involving front-end development, programming logic, and web application building.

Course focused on full stack web development with emphasis on building Web and Mobile applications. During the program I study technologies widely used in the market while developing practical projects involving front-end, programming logic, API consumption, and complete application development.
